channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing bin, 19th July
item.description:
Overflowing bin and fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goldsmith Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 19th July
item.description:
Wood and metal dumped next to refuse bin on green

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wayside Green Open Space, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Been there almost 2 years,number plate sprayed with black paint, 19th July
item.description:
Damped there by criminals ,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastgate Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody., 19th July
item.description:
Overcrowded Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Some bike left abandoned on the private property of Hippodrome Casino. Location: Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12-13, Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags flytipped on Cossall Park, 19th July
item.description:
Some bin bags have been flytipped in the park and left to explode

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodland Trail, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge and tree, 19th July
item.description:
Tree is growing over the pavement hanging in the way of walking safely, and hedges are overgrown over the pavement making the pathway narrow, needs a hard cut back to widen the path again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Crescent Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drawers and long wood pieces and fan south side pavement, 19th July
item.description:
Drawers and wood and fan on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste, 19th July
item.description:
See above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Spring Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th July
item.description:
Large tv, baby chair dumped top of Ruskin Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ruskin Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chevron sign knocked over on Dollis Rd bend, 19th July
item.description:
The chevron sign has been knocked over on the Dollis Road bend near the Oakdean Park woods. It is currently lying flat in the grass. Not sure how long it has been like this as I just saw it today (sun, 19 Jul).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dollis Road, West Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on grass verge. This is now a regular occurrence, 19th July
item.description:
Fly tipping as seen
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Merewood Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped on pavement, 19th July
item.description:
See pic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Surrey Terrace, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Several items dumped. Unable to get too the rubbish bin in chamber. Been there over a week now, 19th July
item.description:
Lottery does not come in regularly too check for fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Huguenot Square, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - commercial/building waste in bags, 19th July
item.description:
There are a large number of black bags that appear to be filled with building or commercial waste (maybe insulation). Additional items are being added to it. Can this be cleared asap and waste inspected to try and identify culprits.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Green, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish chairs cane basket cabinet, 19th July
item.description:
Left there for a week now in front of 86 Webster Rd London se16 4df . Something has to be done as they think it's a dumping ground for rubbish. We have our blue and green waste bin there so they think it's OK just to dump rubbish in front of the bins
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Webster Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped waste around Recycling bin at Braham house, 19th July
item.description:
Bed and other household waste dumped next to bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Tyers Terrace, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colworth Grove, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th July
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Borthwick Street, Deptford

item.title: Removal of old temporary signs for Speed restriction, 19th July
item.description:
Please can someone arrange to remove temporary road signs if no further action required?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Bird in Hand Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
